message:
Strengthen Scatter validation and add Scatter/Gather trace tests

Fix Scatter shape inference to require exactly 3 inputs and reject
rank-0 operands. Add 6 edge case tests: scatter arity, rank-0
rejection, output shape matching, gather with explicit slice_sizes,
gather default slice_sizes, and gather arity validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
